name: surat-food-chain
description: Surat Food Chain Management System — production, inventory, transfers, franchise ordering, billing, payments, expenses, POS and analytics.

scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run api:dev" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm run db:up && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run db:seed
